Tractor Packages
The Handyman Package
Tackle every project like a pro with the John Deere 1025R “Handyman” Package from Middletown Tractor Sales. Designed for property owners and small contractors who need the ultimate all-in-one machine, this powerful compact tractor package handles everything from digging and lifting to hauling and material handling with ease.
The TLB Package
The John Deere 1025R TLB (Tractor-Loader-Backhoe) Package is one of our most popular compact utility setups—and for good reason. Combining exceptional power, versatility, and comfort, this compact workhorse can dig, lift, load, and landscape with ease—all in one go-to machine.
The Load & Mow Package
Take on every task around your property with the John Deere 1025R “Load & Mow” Package from Middletown Tractor Sales. Built for versatility, convenience, and year-round performance, this package gives you the tools you need to tackle both heavy lifting and lawn care — all with one dependable compact tractor.
"Jack of all Trades" Package
The John Deere 1023E Compact Utility Tractor truly lives up to its name — the “Jack of All Trades.” Designed for homeowners, property managers, and small farm owners who need one machine that does it all, this versatile package combines power, convenience, and performance in a compact size.

Middletown Tractor Sales
About Us
Who We Are
We are a family-owned business that started in 1952 serving the agricultural industry in Mannington, WV and have grown to 4 locations covering 26 Counties in North Central West Virginia and South Western Pennsylvania. We serve a wide range of customers from the small and large property owners to farmers, commercial landscape companies, and governmental agencies. We are the oldest John Deere dealer in West Virginia. Our staff has well over 100 years of combined experience, and our history is rich in family, tradition, and service.
What we do
We offer superior products at affordable prices. We have a huge inventory of John Deere tractors, utility vehicles, lawn tractors, hay equipment, and light construction equipment. We also carry popular brand names such as Stihl hand-held equipment, Honda Power Equipment, Alamo, Frontier, and much more. It is our mission to be leaders in our community in terms of product, product support, market share, and community commitment while delivering our products and services to our customers. We strive to exceed our customers' expectations in all that we do and do it with honesty and integrity. So, Make Your Main Factor... Middletown Tractor!

title: Used Farm Equipment For Sale in Pennsylvania & West Virginia | Middletown Tractor Sales
text:
Skip to main content
Used Farm Equipment in Pennsylvania & West Virginia
Looking for dependable used farm equipment? Middletown Tractor Sales offers a wide selection of affordable, well-maintained machinery to meet your agricultural needs. Our inventory features expertly inspected, quality-tested pre-owned farm equipment that is performance-ready and built to deliver reliable results season after season. Each unit offers impressive value without compromise, so visit us in Fairmont and Buckhannon, WV, or Uniontown and Washington, PA to see how our inventory can help you and maintain your budget.
Contact us online
for more information!
Buy Quality Used Farm Equipment
Dependable Pre-Owned Tractors, Implements & Lawn Equipment
Discover a world of opportunity with our
premium selection of used farm and lawn equipment
at
Middletown Tractor Sales
. We understand the needs of
farmers, property owners, and landscapers
who want reliable performance without the high cost of new machinery. Buying
used John Deere® and Ventrac® equipment
is a smart, cost-effective way to boost productivity while maintaining top-tier efficiency and quality.
Cost-Effective Farm Equipment Solutions
Save more without sacrificing performance. Purchasing
used tractors, mowers, and implements
can significantly reduce your upfront investment while delivering the same durability and capability as newer models. Each piece of equipment in our inventory is
inspected, serviced, and ready to work
, allowing you to
stretch your budget
and invest in other critical areas of your operation.
Proven Performance You Can Trust
Every machine we offer has a
track record of reliability
in real-world farming conditions. Many of our pre-owned units come from owners who maintained them meticulously, ensuring long-lasting operation. With
dealer-certified inspections and service
, you can buy confidently knowing your equipment has already
proven itself in the field
.
A Smarter, Sustainable Choice
Buying used farm equipment is also an
environmentally responsible decision
. By extending the lifecycle of durable, well-built machines, you help reduce manufacturing demand and support a more sustainable agricultural industry—without compromising on productivity or performance.
Serving West Virginia & Pennsylvania Farmers
At
Middletown Tractor Sales
, we proudly serve customers from
Fairmont and Buckhannon, WV
, to
Uniontown and Washington, PA
. Our experienced team carefully handpicks every item in our
used equipment inventory
to ensure outstanding quality, value, and dependability.
Explore our
current listings of used tractors, implements, and lawn equipment
today, and see how
buying used
can transform your work efficiently, economically, and sustainably.
Experience
The Middletown Difference
—your trusted partner in agricultural success across West Virginia and Pennsylvania.

title: Farm Equipment Parts For Sale in WV & PA | Middletown Tractor Sales
text:
Skip to main content
Tractor Parts For Sale in Pennsylvania & West Virginia
Farm Equipment Parts For Sale Near You
Keep your equipment performing at its best with genuine, high-quality tractor parts from Middletown Tractor Sales—your trusted John Deere® dealer serving Washington & Uniontown, PA, and Fairmont & Buckhannon, WV.
We understand that equipment uptime is critical. That’s why we stock over $1 million in tractor parts and accessories across all locations, ensuring fast availability when you need it most. Whether you’re looking for OEM John Deere® parts, reliable aftermarket tractor parts, or durable tractor attachments and accessories, our knowledgeable parts specialists are ready to assist.
Call today, order tractor parts online, or visit Middletown Tractor Sales in-store to experience fast, dependable service and the hometown advantage in tractor parts support.
Why Buy Parts from Middletown Tractor Sales?
With decades of dealership experience and one of the largest in-stock inventories in the region,
we get you back to work faster
.
Huge OEM inventory:
Genuine John Deere®, Ventrac®, STIHL®, KUHN®, and Alamo Industrial® parts.
Expert guidance:
Our parts team helps you find the right fit for your machine and recommends compatible replacements.
Fast turnaround:
If we don't have it today, we'll order it with industry-leading speed.
From compact tractors to large ag equipment, we have the
parts, filters, fluids, and attachments
you need at competitive prices.
Parts Return Policy
Stocked Parts:
Return within 30 days for a full refund. After 30 days, a 20% restocking fee applies.
Special-Order John Deere Parts:
Return within 20 days; 20% restocking fee applies.
Special-Order Other Brands:
Vendor policies vary; if returnable, 20% restocking plus shipping.
Electrical Parts:
Non-returnable.
All returns must be unused, in original packaging, and accompanied by your invoice.
Refund Policy
Refunds over $50 are issued via check from our Corporate Office.
Purchases made by check are refunded after a 14-day clearing period.
Returned checks incur a $30 fee.
Our Brands
We proudly carry a full range of OEM parts and accessories from leading brands like John Deere, Ventrac, STIHL, KUHN, and Alamo Industrial, ensuring you get the quality and reliability your equipment demands. In addition to our OEM selection, we offer a wide variety of aftermarket parts, work gear, and branded apparel—everything you need to stay productive, efficient, and comfortable on the job, no matter the season or workload.
Professional Accessory Installation
Need your new part or attachment installed? Our
factory-trained service team
provides professional installation for
attachments, upgrades, and performance enhancements
- ensuring your equipment meets manufacturer standards for safety, efficiency, and longevity.
Contact the Middletown Tractor Parts Department
Ready to order or need help finding the right fit for your equipment? Visit your nearest Middletown Tractor Sales location in Fairmont or Buckhannon, WV, or Washington or Uniontown, PA, to explore our extensive selection of top-quality tractor parts and accessories. Our knowledgeable team is here to make the process easy—whether you’re tracking down a specific part or comparing options to get the best performance from your machine. Give us a call, submit a parts request online, or stop by in person today, and we’ll help you find exactly what you need to keep your equipment running strong.
Not Sure Which Parts You Need?
Visit the John Deere Parts Catalog to quickly search for the exact part you need by model, category, or serial number, making it easy to find the right fit for your equipment. Don’t own a John Deere machine? No problem. Simply send us a parts request, and our experienced team will take the guesswork out of the process by helping you identify and source the correct parts for your equipment—fast, accurate, and hassle-free.
To Text MTS Parts
Buckhannon: 304-473-4402
Fairmont: 304-333-0184
Uniontown: 724-439-5331
Washington: 724-229-0191
To Call MTS Parts
Buckhannon: 304-473-4400
Fairmont: 304-366-4690
Uniontown: 724-439-1234
Washington: 724-229-0191
Order Parts Online
Middletown Tractor Sales Transaction Policies
Parts Return Policies
Stocked Parts:
We gladly accept parts returns for up to 30 days from their original invoice date for full refund. Parts returned AFTER that time will be assessed a 20% restocking charge.
Special Ordered Parts from John Deere:
We happliy accept the return of these parts up to 20 days from their original purchase date; however, a 20% charge will be assessed.
Special Ordered Parts from All Other Brands:
Some vendors will not allow returns on ANY special ordered parts. We will be glad to review their policy upon request. If returnable, a 20% charge plus shipping will be assessed.
Electrical Parts:
No returns will be accepted on electrical items.
*All return items must be unused and in original packageing. Copy of invoice is required for all returns.*
Special Order Policy
We will gladly special order any parts. Non-stock parts that are special ordered, and any parts shipped directly to your home or business, must be paid in advance.
Check Policy
Checks returned for insufficient finds will be assessed a service charge of $30.00. Purchases paid by check will be refunded by check after a 14 days waiting period from date of sale.
Refund Payment Policy
All refunds over the amount of $50.00 will be mailed via check from our Corporate Office.
Thank you for your cooperation!

Quality Tractor Maintenance and Repair Service
Expert Tractor and Equipment Service Near You
For over
70 years
,
Middletown Tractor Sales
has proudly served
farmers, homeowners, and landowners
with reliable equipment and dependable service. From
Washington and Uniontown, Pennsylvania
, to
Fairmont and Buckhannon, West Virginia
, our
John Deere® and Ventrac® service experts
are here to keep your equipment running at peak performance.
Whether you need a
routine tune-up
,
seasonal maintenance
, or an
urgent on-site repair
, you can count on our experienced team to get the job done right - the first time.
Professional Tractor Maintenance and Repair
Routine maintenance and professional servicing are essential to
keeping your equipment efficient, safe, and ready for every season
. At Middletown Tractor Sales, our
certified technicians
handle everything from basic upkeep to major repairs, including:
Oil changes, filters, and fluid checks
to extend the life of your machine.
Comprehensive inspections
to prevent costly breakdowns.
Seasonal service
to prepare for planting, harvesting, or winter storage.
Engine, electrical, and tire repairs
to get you back to work quickly when downtime isn't an option.
Our professional maintenance services help
protect your investment
, improve
equipment safety
, and
maximize performance
in the field or on your property.
Why Choose Middletown Tractor Sales for Service?
When you buy from Middletown Tractor Sales, you get more than just quality equipment - you gain a
dedicated service partner
committed to your success. Here's what makes our service department stand out:
Service Manager:
A full-time professional focused exclusively on the tractors and equipment we sell - ensuring specialized expertise and consistent care.
Service Writer:
A dedicated coordinator who listens to your needs, schedules repairs, and keeps you updated throughout the process.
Special Tools & Technology:
We've invested thousands in
manufacturer-specific diagnostic tools
to deliver faster, more accurate, and cost-effective repairs.
Road Service:
Our
mobile repair trucks
are equipped for
on-site service
- so if you break down in the field, help is just a call away.
Room to Work:
Across our
three full-service locations
, we have
25 service bays
, allowing faster turnaround and shorter wait times.
We also offer
pickup and delivery year-round
, including
free pickup during our annual Winter Service Special
- making maintenance easier and more affordable.
Contact the Middletown Tractor Service Team
Need help with a repair, seasonal prep, or emergency service?
Our trained technicians are ready to help wherever you are - in the shop or right in your field.
Fairmont, WV:
(304) 366-4690
Buckhannon, WV:
(304) 473-4400
Uniontown, PA:
(724) 439-1234
Washington, PA:
(724) 229-0191
You can also
complete our online service request form
below to schedule service or request pickup.
With a fleet of
28 service trucks
, Middletown Tractor Sales is equipped to
pick up, deliver, or repair your equipment
—wherever the job takes you.

Can't haul your equipment yourself? No problem! Our fleet of 28 trucks is on the road all the time picking up and delivering units to our customers. We offer a low, fixed-rate to provide these services to all of our customers.
Broken Down in the Field?
Submit a Service Request or give your nearest location a call to request a mobile repair service. Emergencies happen, but we are prepared. Our trucks are also outfitted with cranes, so we can take care of all your repair needs -- on-site.

title: Ventrac Equipment | WV & PA | Ventrac Dealer
text:
Skip to main content
New Ventrac 4520
Ventrac® Tractors & Attachments for Sale in West Virginia & Pennsylvania
Versatile Machines Built to Conquer Every Landscape
Ventrac has you covered
with powerful, versatile equipment designed to handle tough mowing, steep hillsides, and year-round property challenges. With a
Ventrac tractor or attachment
, you get unmatched stability, performance, and safety — even in conditions that stop other machines in their tracks.
Each Ventrac model is built with
all-wheel drive
,
articulated steering
, and
powerful commercial-grade engines
that deliver control, comfort, and confidence. Whether you’re managing turf, slopes, snow, or soil, Ventrac helps you take on the hardest jobs with ease and precision.
All-Wheel Drive Power Meets Unmatched Versatility
From mowing to snow removal, trenching to leaf management,
Ventrac tractors
are engineered for every season. With over
30 available attachments
, these machines transform effortlessly to fit your workflow.
Popular Ventrac attachments include:
Finish and rough-cut mowers
for beautiful turf care
Snow blowers and blades
for reliable winter performance
Trenchers, aerators, and tillers
for landscaping and soil prep
Brooms, buckets, and blades
for all-purpose maintenance
Whatever your property demands, Ventrac gives you the flexibility to get it done safely, efficiently, and comfortably — all while reducing turf disturbance and improving traction on challenging terrain.
Stability, Comfort & Control You Can Rely On
Thanks to its
low-profile design and unique weight distribution
, Ventrac offers the stability you need to handle steep slopes and uneven ground confidently. Operators enjoy
superior visibility
,
easy control access
, and
exceptional ride comfort
, making long workdays safer and more productive.
It’s no wonder Ventrac is trusted by municipalities, golf courses, property managers, and homeowners who want top-tier performance in all conditions.
Your Local Ventrac Dealer in WV & PA
At
Middletown Tractor Sales
, we’re proud to be your authorized
Ventrac dealer
serving
Buckhannon, West Virginia
, as well as
Washington, Pennsylvania
. Our experienced team is ready to help you explore the full lineup of
Ventrac tractors, implements, and attachments
, answer your questions, and provide expert recommendations based on your property’s unique needs.
Stop by one of our dealership locations today
to see our complete
Ventrac equipment lineup
, schedule a
hands-on demo
, and get a
personalized quote
. Experience
The Middletown Difference
—where performance, reliability, and customer care come standard.

How Ventrac® Attachments Can Help You
Expand What’s Possible with Ventrac
One of the most trusted names in the equipment industry,
Ventrac®
is known for producing
versatile, durable, and high-performing machines
that thrive in demanding environments. You’ll find Ventrac tractors and attachments hard at work across farms, campuses, golf courses, and commercial properties nationwide — helping operators do more with less time and effort.
As your
leading Ventrac dealer in West Virginia and Pennsylvania
,
Middletown Tractor Sales
is proud to offer a full selection of
Ventrac attachments
designed to increase your tractor’s versatility and year-round performance. Read on to discover how these implements can elevate your work, then visit us near
Clarksburg, WV
or
Pittsburgh, PA
to explore our full lineup in person.
Turf & Estate Management
Maintaining large properties requires reliable, efficient tools — and
Ventrac attachments
deliver just that. Whether you’re in
landscaping, campground management, or golf course maintenance
, Ventrac implements make year-round work easier and faster.
With options like
tillers, mower decks, power brooms, and blades
, you can handle mowing, mulching, debris removal, leaf cleanup, and snow management all with one machine. From spring to winter,
Ventrac’s all-season versatility
keeps your grounds looking their best.
Vineyard Applications
Vineyard operations require specialized equipment that can safely navigate
narrow rows and uneven terrain
.
Ventrac compact tractors
paired with attachments such as the
AERA-vator, tough cut brush mower, and dual wheel kit
make it easy to maintain your vineyard efficiently — without damaging your vines or soil.
Their
low center of gravity
and
superior traction
make them the perfect fit for delicate agricultural environments where precision matters as much as power.
Poultry Farm Solutions
When working in barns and confined areas, maneuverability is key.
Ventrac attachments
like the
turbine-style blower
and
power broom
help poultry farmers manage bedding, debris, and litter quickly and cleanly. These compact, efficient tools help maintain healthier, safer environments while saving valuable time.
Whether you’re
laying bedding, cleaning litter, or squeegeeing floors
, Ventrac attachments make daily operations smoother and more productive.
Snow Removal & Winter Work
When winter hits, Ventrac equipment shines. Built to withstand harsh temperatures and heavy use,
Ventrac snow attachments
— including
snow blowers, blades, and rotary brooms
— help clear driveways, parking lots, and sidewalks efficiently without damaging the surface beneath.
Add a
Ventrac winter cab
for comfort and protection from the elements, and you’ll be clearing snow in warmth and style all season long.
Municipalities & Educational Institutions
For large properties such as
parks, campuses, schools, and municipalities
,
Ventrac attachments
offer unmatched durability and versatility. From
ballpark groomers and field renovators
to
vacuum collection systems
, these implements keep high-traffic spaces well-maintained, safe, and professional-looking year-round.
Whether it’s daily upkeep or seasonal projects, Ventrac gives maintenance teams the tools they need to do more — faster and more effectively.
Your Trusted Ventrac Dealer in WV & PA
We hope this guide has given you a better look at how
Ventrac attachments
can simplify your workload and expand your tractor’s potential. If you’re looking for
Ventrac attachments for sale near Clarksburg, WV, or Pittsburgh, PA
, contact the sales team at
Middletown Tractor Sales
today.
We’re proud to be the
preferred Ventrac dealer
for
West Virginia and Pennsylvania
, offering expert support, hands-on demos, and dependable service for every customer. Experience
The Middletown Difference
— where quality equipment meets local expertise.
Visit Us in West Virginia or Pennsylvania!
No matter the weather, rain or shine, Ventrac equipment offers performance that keeps up with the competition. Visit us at one of our authorized Ventrac dealer locations for all the information you need about Ventrac equipment. Our Buckhannon, WV location provides service to folks in Upshur, Randolph, Lewis, and Harrison County! Or stop by our Washington, PA location proudly serving Washington, Greene, Fayette, & Allegheny County or anywhere in between!

title: Tractorpackageslp | Middletown Tractor Sales | Fairmont West Virginia
text:
Skip to main content
Tractor Packages at Middletown Tractor Sales
Pick The Package The Meets Your Needs
Jack of All Trades Package – John Deere 1023E
Middletown Exclusive Tractor Package at Middletown Tractor Sales
Looking for one compact tractor that can
mow, till, cut, and move material
without switching machines? The
Jack of All Trades Package
built around the
John Deere 1023E
is designed for property owners, hobby farmers, and land managers who need real versatility at an affordable monthly payment.
This all-in-one package from Middletown Tractor Sales gives you the power of a John Deere compact tractor paired with the most useful attachments for year-round work.
✅ Package Includes
John Deere 1023E Compact Tractor
Front Loader – lift, move, and load with ease
54" AutoConnect™ Mowing Deck
– fast, professional lawn cutting
50" Tiller
– prepare gardens and food plots
4' Rotary Cutter
– tackle brush and tall grass
Only $299 per month
– Middletown Exclusive Value
Built to Handle Every Job Around Your Property
The John Deere 1023E is known for its
easy operation, durability, and fuel-efficient diesel power
. Whether you maintain a few acres or manage a small farm, this tractor package is ready to:
Mow large yards and fields quickly
Till garden beds and landscaping projects
Clear overgrown areas and fence lines
Move mulch, gravel, firewood, and more
With the AutoConnect mowing deck, switching from tractor work to finish mowing takes seconds—no tools, no hassle.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
The “TLB” Package – John Deere 1025R
Middletown’s Most Popular Tractor-Loader-Backhoe Package
When you need true digging and loading power in a compact, easy-to-use machine, the
John Deere 1025R TLB Package
is the proven choice. This tractor-loader-backhoe combination is built for homeowners, contractors, and property owners who want professional capability without stepping up to a full-size construction machine.
The TLB Package from Middletown Tractor Sales gives you the tools to
dig, load, grade, and move material
with one dependable John Deere compact tractor.
✅ Package Includes
John Deere 1025R Compact Tractor
120R Front Loader
– lift dirt, stone, mulch, and debris
260B Backhoe
– dig trenches, footers, and drainage lines
This is our
Most Popular Tractor-Loader-Backhoe
setup because it delivers real construction-style performance while staying small enough for tight properties and residential jobs.
Built for Digging, Loading & Getting Work Done
The John Deere 1025R is known for its
hydrostatic ease, diesel torque, and legendary reliability
. With the TLB Package you can:
Install water lines and drainage systems
Dig for landscaping and hardscaping projects
Clear brush, stumps, and storm damage
Move gravel, topsoil, and building materials
Maintain driveways and property with precision
Quick-attach loader and backhoe controls make it simple to switch between tasks — no rental yard, no downtime, no compromise.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
The “Handyman” Package – John Deere 1025R
Middletown Exclusive Tractor Package at Middletown Tractor Sales
When you need serious capability in a compact size, the
John Deere 1025R Handyman Package
delivers the power to
lift, dig, load, and move
with one versatile machine. Built for homeowners, property managers, and small farm operators, this package is designed to handle the tough jobs that a lawn tractor just can’t touch.
From clearing brush to trenching utilities, the Handyman Package gives you professional-grade performance in an easy-to-use compact tractor.
✅ Package Includes
John Deere 1025R Compact Tractor
120R Front Loader
– move dirt, gravel, mulch, and firewood
260B Backhoe
– dig trenches, footers, and drainage lines
900 lb. Pallet Forks
– lift materials, pallets, and equipment
This setup turns your 1025R into a true do-it-all workhorse for projects around your home, farm, or jobsite.
Built for Real Work Around Your Property
The John Deere 1025R is one of the most popular compact tractors in America for a reason — it combines
diesel power, hydrostatic ease, and legendary John Deere durability
.
With the Handyman Package you can:
Dig and repair water lines or drainage
Move landscaping materials with precision
Clear storm damage and brush piles
Lift heavy pallets, feed, or building supplies
Tackle weekend projects without renting equipment
The quick-attach loader and backhoe make switching tasks fast, so you spend more time working and less time wrenching.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
🚜 The “Load & Mow” Package – John Deere 1025R
The Perfect Compact Tractor for Property Maintenance
If you need one machine to
maintain your lawn and handle real work
, the
John Deere 1025R Load & Mow Package
is the ideal combination. Built for homeowners and property owners, this setup pairs the power of a compact tractor with a professional mowing deck and a versatile front loader.
From cutting acres of grass to moving mulch, gravel, and firewood, the Load & Mow Package gives you everyday capability in a comfortable, easy-to-operate tractor.
✅ Package Includes
John Deere 1025R Compact Tractor
120R Front Loader
– lift, load, and move materials with ease
54D AutoConnect™ Mowing Deck
– fast, smooth, finish-quality mowing
This package is designed for customers who want
lawn tractor comfort with real tractor muscle
.
Built to Mow Beautifully & Work Hard
The John Deere 1025R delivers
diesel power, hydrostatic simplicity, and legendary Deere reliability
. With the Load & Mow Package you can:
Mow large yards and fields with a professional finish
Move mulch, stone, and landscaping materials
Clean up storm debris and brush
Maintain driveways and trails
Handle year-round property projects
The
AutoConnect mowing deck
lets you switch from mowing to loader work in seconds — no tools, no hassle, just productivity.

title: About Middletown Tractor Sales | WV & PA
text:
Skip to main content
About Middletown Tractor Sales
Experience The Middletown Difference
Over 70 Years of Family-Owned Excellence
At
Middletown Tractor Sales
, we're more than just a dealership - we're a
family-owned business
built on over
70 years of dedication
to our customers and communities. As the
oldest John Deere® dealer in West Virginia
, we proudly serve
Fairmont and Buckhannon, WV
, along with
Uniontown and Washington, PA
.
Our experienced team brings together over
a century of combined knowledge
to deliver expert advice, quality equipment, and dependable service you can trust. Whether you're a
homeowner, farmer, contractor, municipality, or part of the oil and gas industry
, Middletown Tractor Sales is your trusted local partner for all things John Deere.
Our History
Our story began in
1952
, when
Dallas Boyers
opened a small
feed and farm supply store in Mannington, West Virginia
. What started as a modest local business has grown into a
multi-location dealership
with deep roots and strong family values.
Now in its
third generation of the Boyers family leadership
, Middletown Tractor Sales continues to grow while staying true to its founding principles of honesty, integrity, and customer-first service.
Over the decades, we've expanded to include
The John Deere Place in Fairmont, WV (The Middletown Tractor Sales Corporate Headquarters)
, and additional locations in
Buckhannon, WV
, and
Washington and Uniontown, PA
-bringing the
Middletown Difference
to more communities across Appalachia.
Our Products
We carry an extensive selection of
new and used equipment
from world-class brands, including
John Deere®, Ventrac®, STIHL®, KUHN®, and Alamo Industrial®
. Our inventory includes:
Mowers
- Zero-turn, riding, and walk-behind models for homeowners and professionals.
Farm Equipment
- Tractors, hay tools, tillage, and planting implements for every operation size.
Construction Equipment
- Skid steers, compact track loaders, excavators, and more.
Utility Vehicles (UTVs)
- Reliable Gator™ models for farm, worksite, or recreation use.
Our knowledgeable sales staff is here to help you choose the right equipment for your needs, goals, and budget.
Financing Solutions
We believe
quality equipment should be accessible to everyone
. That's why we offer
flexible financing options
through
trusted lenders
including
John Deere Financial
and
First Exchange Bank
. With
customizable payment plans
, competitive rates, and fast approvals, we make it easy to purchase the equipment you need without financial stress.
Parts Department
Our
parts department
stocks more than
$1 million in inventory
, featuring
OEM parts
for top brands like
John Deere, Ventrac, STIHL, KUHN, and Alamo Industrial
-along with a wide selection of aftermarket options.
We also provide
special orders, gear, and accessories
, ensuring you have everything needed to maintain your equipment and keep your operation running efficiently.
Service Department
Backed by
factory-certified technicians
,
25 service bays
,
mobile service trucks
, and
pickup/delivery options
, our
service department
is equipped to handle everything from
routine maintenance
to
major repairs
.
Our team of
John Deere Master Technicians
takes pride in delivering fast, accurate service that minimizes downtime and keeps you productive.
Trust & Service Focused
When you buy from
Middletown Tractor Sales
, you're not just getting equipment - you're joining a community built on trust, experience, and service. For more than 70 years, our family-owned John Deere dealership has helped farmers, homeowners, and businesses get more done with dependable
John Deere equipment
and personalized support. Our customers choose us because we combine
premium John Deere quality
with
local expertise
,
honest pricing
, and
factory-trained technicians
who keep your machines running their best. Whether you're shopping for a new compact tractor, servicing your mower, or exploring our latest
financing offers
, you'll always experience
The Middletown Difference
- where
service meets integrity
and
customers become family
.
Contact Us
We invite you to visit any of our locations to explore our equipment, meet our team, and experience
The Middletown Difference
firsthand.
Locations:
Fairmont, WV
Buckhannon, WV
Uniontown, PA
Washington, PA
Call us at (304) 366-4690
or
fill out our online form
to request information, schedule a demo, or get a personalized quote.
At
Middletown Tractor Sales
, we're proud to serve our communities today-and for generations to come.
Company Philosophy
Our Vision
To consistently grow the business in a financially sound manner. We will do this by hiring, training and retaining employees who can help our customers find solutions in acquiring and maintaining their John Deere Equipment.
Our Mission
"MAKE YOUR MAIN FACTOR... Middletown Tractor Sales"
It is our mission to be leaders in our community in terms of product, product support, market share, and community commitment while delivering our products and services to our customers. We will strive to exceed our customers' expectations in all that we do and do it with honesty and integrity.
Our Values for Success
Respect for Individuals
Integrity
Teamwork
Openness to new ideas
Commitment to continuous improvement
Passion for extraordinary customer service
Continuous Stakeholder Value Enhancement
Setting a business example as if Christ was our partner
Contact Us
Middletown Tractor Sales is conveniently located near the areas of Morgantown, WV; Clarksburg, WV; Buckhannon, WV; Wheeling, WV; Waynesburg, PA; Pittsburgh, PA; Belle Vernon, PA.
×

The Perfect Package for Every Property
At
Middletown Tractor Sales
, we make it easy to find the
right John Deere® tractor package
to fit your land, your work, and your budget. Whether you're maintaining a small property, managing a farm, or handling landscaping and construction projects, our

combine performance, versatility, and value - all in one convenient deal.
Our team hand-selects each package to give you the tools you need to tackle every task year-round, from mowing and hauling to digging and grading. Each setup features
reliable John Deere equipment
with the attachments and implements you'll actually use - all at a great bundled price.
Explore Our Most Popular John Deere Tractor Packages
Choose from our best-selling tractor and implement combinations:
The Handyman Package
- 1025R with 120R Loader, 260B Backhoe, and 900 lb. Pallet Forks for all-around property maintenance.
The TLB Package
- 1025R with 120R Loader and 260B Backhoe, our most popular tractor-loader-backhoe combo.
The Load & Mow Package
- 1025R with 120R Loader and 54D AutoConnect™ Mowing Deck for versatile yard and material handling.
The "Jack of All Trades" Package
- 1023E with 54D AutoConnect™ Mowing Deck, 50" Tiller, 4' Rotary Cutter, and 120R Loader for unmatched versatility.
Each package is designed to save you time, simplify your work, and give you the most out of your investment - backed by
John Deere's legendary quality
and

.

Front & Wide Area Mowers
Middletown Tractor Sales is here with powerful equipment to help manage your expansive lawns and fields with flawless precision. Front mount mowers, also known as wide area mowers, are perfect for standard mowing tasks that necessitate access to tight, out-of-reach spaces. Functions like cutting beneath hedges and shrubs become a cinch with front mounted decks that extend blade reach. Once you couple deck blade reach with increased speed capabilities, you can trust that you’ll cut time on separate trimming tasks significantly. These John Deere front deck mowers can offer features like liquid-cooled, 3-cylinder diesel engines, your choice of 7-Iron™ PRO Side Discharge or Fastback™ Rear Discharge Decks, economical cast-in block cylinders, automatically initiated air heaters for easier cold-weather starting, and much more - you just can’t lose. Additionally, there are several attachment options - biodiesel conversion kits, snow blowers, blades, and brooms, and more – that conjoin utility with convenience to create an optimal experience for maintaining outdoor spaces year around. title: Parts Specials | Middletown Tractor Sales | Fairmont West Virginia
text:
Skip to main content
Parts Specials
STIHL The most powerful battery-powered blower in the STIHL AK System, the BGA 60 blower provides 65% more blowing force than the BGA 57, while delivering a range of features for comfort and convenience. This premium homeowner blower is ideally suited for low-noise environments and easily stores with a convenient built-in hanging slot. A variable-speed trigger and boost mode help users clear grass clippings, leaves, and other yard debris from hard surfaces such as balconies, driveways, and sidewalks. A one-touch adjustable blower tube allows you to easily change the blower tube length to adjust to different heights and to permit access hard-to-reach areas. A metal ring on the blower nozzle provides protection against wear and creates a high-quality look. The BGA 60 comes ready for the STIHL Smart connector, so you can add a performance tracker that sends tool data to your smartphone or other device via Bluetooth® technology.

title: Frontier Snow Removal Equipment | WV & PA | Frontier Dealer
text:
Skip to main content
Frontier Snow Removal Equipment in WV & PA
At Middletown Tractor sales you will find a fine selection of Frontier snow removal equipment for sale. We have everything from brooms, blades, to blowers, so come by a location nearest you today to see what all we have. You can find us in Farimont, WV or in Uniontown and Washington, PA!
Manufacturers
Current
Frontier
Snow-Removal-Equipment
Pull Type Snow Blowers
Rear 3-Point Hitch Snow Blowers
Loader-Mount Snow Blowers
Loader-Mount Snow Pushes
Loader-Mount Front Blades
Loader-Mount Rotary Brooms
Hydraulic Power Packs
Frontier™ Snow Removal Equipment
Whether you’re in charge of clearing public property or private land, you’ll want the right tools to help you out. Sometimes, all you really need is the right attachment. That’s why you’ll want to check out the Middletown Tractor Sales spread of Frontier snow removal equipment. Prepare yourself for the next snow dump by stopping by one of our locations today! You’ll find us in Fairmont, West Virginia, and Washington and Uniontown, Pennsylvania.
3-Point Snowblowers
If your tractor uses a 3-point hitch, then you’ll want a 3-point snowblower. These snowblowers are perfect for your large property and can eat through lots of snow quickly. Attaching them to your tractor is easy and efficient, while the chute and deflector angles allow you to throw snow in the direction you want at a distance you want.
Loader-Mount Snowblowers
Frontier also offers loader-mount snowblowers for some of your larger machines. These are specifically designed for front loaders, while still giving you all the great features you need to tend to your property. You can also get improved visibility and reduced operator fatigue.
Front Blades
Sometimes a snowblower, or a snow thrower, is a little bit much. Sometimes, all you really need is a snow pusher. You can use a front blade as a way to move snow into piles next to your machine. This is generally better for smaller amounts of snow, but it can be a more affordable and efficient way to clear a path for pedestrians or cars.
Loader-Mount Rotary Brooms
Loader-mount rotary brooms are more commonly used as a way to sweep dust and dirt off of paved areas, but they can also be used for a light dusting of snow. This can keep slick spots from developing in parking lots and on driveways and can save you lots of time.
Snow Push
The official Frontier snow push is a great way for fast and easy snow removal, especially around buildings, fences, and other hard-to-reach areas. They fit a wide range of loaders so you can choose the model that’s right for your operation. You can also choose between rubber and steel edges, depending on what you’re looking at.
Ready to check out some Frontier snow removal equipment? Stop by Middletown Tractor Sales near Pittsburgh, PA and Morgantown, WV for a tour of available models or check out our full online catalog today!

2026 Honda Power Generators EB10000AN
Features may include:
CO-MINDER: Advanced Carbon Monoxide Detection System
CO-MINDER™ continuously monitors carbon monoxide (CO) levels. It automatically shuts down the generator before detected CO levels near the generator become dangerously high.
Advanced technology for consistent power and performance
The EB10000 uses Honda's exclusive DAVR (Digital Automatic Voltage Regulator). The DAVR is designed to hold the voltage stability within a +/- 1% range during operation. This provides more consistent power.
Powerful Honda GX630 commercial engine
The Honda V-Twin engine offers more power, reliability, greater fuel economy and reduced emissions in a more compact package.
Compact shape and unique design for easy installations
The EB10000 has a compact, slim design that can be easily installed on the job site. A centralized exhaust mechanism creates a unique "hot" zone for exhaust and "cool" zone for operation and passage. This design is especially helpful when using multiple units, as they can be easily positioned so as not to impact each others' cooling ventilation.
Quietest in its class!
The Honda EB10000 generator operates at a quiet noise level—73 decibels at 7 meters (equivalent to the noise of a vacuum cleaner). This low noise level is achieved through a large muffler that includes a punching pipe, a perforated mechanism that allows for the smooth release of exhaust gas.
7 outlets for easy connection of multiple tools
The control panel is positioned on the narrow side of the generator for convenient, easy access to all outlets.
i-Monitor LCD readout for performance monitoring and service diagnosis
i-Monitor™ provides information on hours of operation, generator output voltage, and battery voltage, as well as diagnostics for convenient dealer servicing.
3 year residential warranty
You can rest easy, knowing your generator is covered from top to bottom for 3 full years.
Easy folding handles
Wide, positive lock folding handles offer convenient transport and storage and a more compact unit.
Two wheel kit for easy transporting
The sturdy wheel kit makes the EB10000 easier to transport, even over rough terrain.
Best in class fuel efficency
The EB10000 runs an impressive 7.9 hours at half load and 5.4 hours at full load.

2026 Honda Power Generators EB2200ITAN
Features may include:
More power. Same legendary quality.
The EB2200i delivers 10% more power than the previous EB2000 - enabling you to power more of what you need, in the same lightweight, compact package.
Portable power for your job site
The EB2200i can operate a wide variety of industrial tools, making it perfect for portable use on any job site. Take a look at the applications tab for more examples.
CO-MINDER™: Advanced Carbon Monoxide Detection System
CO-MINDER™ continuously monitors carbon monoxide (CO) levels. It automatically shuts down the generator before detected CO levels near the generator become dangerously high.
Honda GXR120 Engine - Commercial grade reliability
GXR120 delivers exceptionally quiet, smooth, fuel-efficient performance in a small, lightweight package. Honda's GXR120 also delivers superb durability and reliability.
GFCI Protection
The EB2200i has full GFCI protection. It's OSHA Compliant, making it ideal for jobsite applications.
Advanced inverter technology - reliable power for sensitive equipment and electronics
Honda's inverter technology means stable, clean power in a smaller, lighter package. Our inverter generators produce power that is as reliable as the power you get from your outlets at home.
Super quiet - less noise than normal conversation
So quiet, you can hardly hear it running. The EB2200i operates at 48 to 57 dBA, which is less noise than a normal conversation.
Lightweight and compact
Weighing just over 47 pounds, the EB2200i is incredibly lightweight and portable, thanks to Honda's inverter technology.
Fuel efficient - runs up to 8.1 hrs on less than a gallon of fuel
Thanks to our exclusive Eco Throttle System, the EB2200i offers great fuel efficiency. Runs 3.2 to 8.1 hours on a single tank, depending on the load.
Easier oil changes
A bigger oil filler opening, longer spout, and larger oil drain gutter make for easier and cleaner oil changes.
Fuel shutoff ("Fuel Off" position)
The “Fuel Off" position allows the engine to continue to run until the majority of the fuel in the carburetor is consumed and the engine shuts off. This helps prevent stale fuel issues and is useful when storing the generator.

Features may include:
Powers fridge, furnace, well pump, and much more
The EM5000SX can power a wide variety of appliances in your home. Check the applications tab for more examples.
Consistent power with iAVR (Intelligent Automatic Voltage Regulation) technology
Honda's exclusive iAVR technology ensures a consistent flow of power regardless of the load. This translates into stable power for sensitive equipment and a more reliable power source for you.
Provides 7,000 watts for 10 sec to start larger equipment
Honda exclusive iAVR technology lets the generator operate well above its maximum rating for up to 10 seconds to start high initial amp draw equipment.
Honda My Generator app + Bluetooth® capability
Honda's exclusive My Generator smartphone app offers remote generator operation and monitoring with impressive performance and unmatched convenience. The app includes wireless start/stop, operation monitoring, and service reminders, utilizing Bluetooth® connectivity.*
CO-MINDER: Advanced Carbon Monoxide Detection System
CO-MINDER™ continuously monitors carbon monoxide (CO) levels. It automatically shuts down the generator before detected CO levels near the generator become dangerously high.
Powerful Honda iGX commercial engine
Honda’s innovative iGX series engines deliver exactly what you’ve always wanted: reliable, optimal performance. These intelligent computer-controlled engines operate automatically with much better, simpler, and faster controls.
Electric start
Electric start (battery included) makes starting easy, along with recoil back-up
120/240V Selector switch - More usable power, more flexibility
Choose between using both 120 and 240 Volts, or 120 Volts only. This allows for the total generator output to be available through any of the 120 volt outlets, limited only by the capacity of the individual outlet. This enables you to power units with larger wattage requirements.
Easy folding handles
Wide, positive lock folding handles offer convenient transport and storage and a more compact unit.
3 year residential warranty
You can rest easy, knowing your generator is covered from top to bottom for 3 full years.
Runs up to 10.5 hours on 6.2 gallon tank
Runs approximately 10.5 hours at half load and 7.1 hours at full load. This makes the EM5000 great for overnight power.

2026 Honda Power Generators EU2200ITAN
Features may include:
More power. Same legendary quality.
The EU2200i delivers 10% more power than the previous EU2000i - enabling you to power more of what you need, in the same lightweight, compact package. Whether it's an extra refrigerator at home, a larger saw on your construction site, a larger TV at your tailgate party, the EU2200i gives you the power to get more done.
Power for microwave, refrigerators, hair dryer, small AC units, and much more
The EU2200i can operate a wide variety of appliances, making it perfect for portable use at home, camping, on the jobsite, or much more. Take a look at the applications tab for more examples.
Honda My Generator app + Bluetooth® capability
Honda's exclusive My Generator smartphone app offers remote generator operation and monitoring with impressive performance and unmatched convenience. The app includes wireless stop, operation monitoring, and service reminders, utilizing Bluetooth® connectivity.*
CO-MINDER: Advanced Carbon Monoxide Detection System
CO-MINDER™ continuously monitors carbon monoxide (CO) levels. It automatically shuts down the generator before detected CO levels near the generator become dangerously high.
Honda GXR120 Engine - Commercial grade reliability
The EU2200i is powered by the Honda GXR120 Commercial Series engine. The GXR120 delivers exceptionally quiet, smooth, fuel-efficient performance in a small, lightweight package. The size of a generator's engine directly correlates to how much power it can produce. At 121cc, the GXR120 is at the top of its class - ensuring the EU2200 always produces the power you need to get the job done. Originally developed for heavy duty construction equipment, the GXR120 also delivers superb durability and reliability.
Super quiet - less noise than normal conversation
So quiet, your neighbors will thank you. The EU2200i operates at 48 to 57 dBA, which is less noise than a normal conversation. This makes it ideal for camping, supplemental RV power, and any other activity that requires quiet operation.
Easy starting, every time
The EU2200i is designed for quick and easy starting. Honda's automatic mechanical decompressor system significantly reduces the amount of force needed to start the engine. Operational contact points are color-coded in gray to quickly guide the user through the starting operation.
Lightweight and compact
Weighing just over 47 pounds, the EU2200i is incredibly lightweight and portable. Thanks to Honda's inverter technology, it's easy to transport and store.
Fuel efficient - runs up to 8.1 hrs on less than a gallon of fuel
Thanks to our exclusive Eco Throttle System, the EU2200i offers great fuel efficiency. Runs 3.2 to 8.1 hours on a single tank, depending on the load. This makes it great for overnight power.
Advanced inverter technology - reliable power for computers and other sensitive equipment
Honda's inverter technology means stable, clean power in a smaller, lighter package. The precision of Honda's inverter technology ensures our inverter generators produce power that is as reliable as the power you get from your outlets at home.
Double your power with parallel capability
Need more power? Add a second EU2200i for additional power. The EU2200i will also parallel with EU2000iK1/T1 models. Find a complete serial number list at the link below.
Easier oil changes
A bigger oil filler opening, longer spout, and larger oil drain gutter make for easier and cleaner oil changes.

2026 Honda Power Generators EU2200ITAN3
Features may include:
Realtree Edge camo exterior
A perfect complement to all your outdoor adventures, the Realtree Edge camo exterior is designed to blend into any environment.
More power. Same legendary quality.
The all new EU2200i delivers 10% more power than the EU2000 - enabling you to power more of what you need, in the same lightweight, compact package. Whether it's an extra refrigerator at home, a larger saw on your construction site, a larger TV at your tailgate party, the EU2200i gives you the power to get more done.
Power for microwave, refrigerators, hair dryer, small AC units, and much more
The EU2200i can operate a wide variety of appliances, making it perfect for portable use at home, camping, on the jobsite, or much more. Take a look at the applications tab for more examples.
Honda My Generator app + Bluetooth® capability
Honda's exclusive My Generator smartphone app offers remote generator operation and monitoring with impressive performance and unmatched convenience. The app includes wireless stop, operation monitoring, and service reminders, utilizing Bluetooth® connectivity.*
CO-MINDER: Advanced Carbon Monoxide Detection System
CO-MINDER™ continuously monitors carbon monoxide (CO) levels. It automatically shuts down the generator before detected CO levels near the generator become dangerously high.
Honda GXR120 Engine - Commercial grade reliability
The EU2200i is powered by the Honda GXR120 Commercial Series engine. The GXR120 delivers exceptionally quiet, smooth, fuel-efficient performance in a small, lightweight package. The size of a generator's engine directly correlates to how much power it can produce. At 121cc, the GXR120 is at the top of its class - ensuring the EU2200 always produces the power you need to get the job done. Originally developed for heavy duty construction equipment, the GXR120 also delivers superb durability and reliability.
Super quiet - less noise than normal conversation
So quiet, your neighbors will thank you. The EU2200i operates at 48 to 57 dBA, which is less noise than a normal conversation. This makes it ideal for camping, supplemental RV power, and any other activity that requires quiet operation.
Easy starting, every time
The EU2200i is designed for quick and easy starting. Honda's automatic mechanical decompressor system significantly reduces the amount of force needed to start the engine. Operational contact points are color-coded in gray to quickly guide the user through the starting operation.
Lightweight and compact
Weighing just over 47 pounds, the EU2200i is incredibly lightweight and portable. Thanks to Honda's inverter technology, it's easy to transport and store.
Fuel efficient - runs up to 8.1 hrs on less than a gallon of fuel
Thanks to our exclusive Eco Throttle System, the EU2200i offers great fuel efficiency. Runs 3.2 to 8.1 hours on a single tank, depending on the load. This makes it great for overnight power.
Advanced inverter technology - reliable power for computers and other sensitive equipment
Honda's inverter technology means stable, clean power in a smaller, lighter package. The precision of Honda's inverter technology ensures our inverter generators produce power that is as reliable as the power you get from your outlets at home.

Features may include:
3200 Watts of Portable Power
The EU3200i can operate a wide variety of appliances, including a furnace, fridge, microwave, RV AC, and much more. It's ideal for RVs, outdoor events, home back up power, and much more.
Compact & Lightweight Design
At less than 60 lbs, the EU3200i is the lightest, most compact 3000 watt series generator we've ever made. Two integrated handles make it easy to lift, carry, and store.
Easy Starts & Simple Operation
Quick and easy 2-step chokeless starting: just turn on and pull for instant power.
Convenient Smartphone Control
Easily monitor fuel level, power output, Eco Throttle® and much more, all from the palm of your hand. The app includes wireless stop, operation monitoring, and service reminders. Built-in Bluetooth® connectivity teams with the exclusive Honda My Generator Bluetooth® App for the ultimate in freedom and control.
Exceptional Fuel efficiency
Thanks to Honda's exclusive Eco Throttle System, the EU3200i offers great fuel efficiency. Runs up to 8.6 hours on a single tank, depending on the load. This makes it great for overnight power.
Powerful Honda GX130 Fuel-Injected Engine
Smart electronic fuel injection technology increases fuel efficiency, eliminates the engine choke, and reduces fuel associated carburetor problems.
Know with a Glance
Front panel LED indicators provide quick, convenient viewing of fuel level, Eco Throttle® operation, and more.
Super quiet - less noise than normal conversation
So quiet, your neighbors will thank you. The EU3200i operates at 54 to 58 dB(A), which is less noise than a normal conversation. This makes it ideal for camping, RV power and any other activity that requires quiet operation.
Clean, Stable Power for Electronics
Honda Inverter Technology provides home-outlet quality power for sensitive electronics.
Double Your Power
Parallel with another EU3200i for output as high as 6400 watts.
Added Peace Of Mind
CO-MINDER® system is designed to automatically shut down the generator if it detects carbon monoxide gas reaching unsafe levels.

Features may include:
Perfect for home back up power, RVs, outdoor events, and more
The EU7000iS can operate a wide variety of appliances, making it perfect for portable use at home, camping, or much more. Take a look at the applications tab for more examples.
Electronic Fuel Injection offers better fuel efficiency and lower maintenance
Smart electronic fuel injection technology increases fuel efficiency, eliminates the engine choke, and reduces fuel associated carburetor problems. And of course, the reliable Honda GX390 engine is designed for long life and superior performance.
Honda My Generator app + Bluetooth® capability
Honda's exclusive My Generator smartphone app offers remote generator operation and monitoring with impressive performance and unmatched convenience. The app includes wireless start/stop, operation monitoring, and service reminders, utilizing Bluetooth® connectivity.*
CO-MINDER: Advanced Carbon Monoxide Detection System
CO-MINDER™ continuously monitors carbon monoxide (CO) levels. It automatically shuts down the generator before detected CO levels near the generator become dangerously high.
Super quiet - less noise than normal conversation
So quiet, your neighbors will thank you. The EU7000iS operates at 52 to 58 dB(A), which is less noise than a normal conversation. This makes it ideal for supplemental RV power, powering outdoor events, and any other activity that requires quiet operation.
Fuel efficient - runs up to 16 hours on 5.1 gal. of fuel
Thanks to our exclusive Eco-Throttle System, the EU7000iS offers great fuel efficiency. Runs between 6.4 to 16 hours on a single tank, depending on the load. This makes it great for overnight power.
Advanced inverter technology - reliable power for computers and other sensitive equipment
Honda's inverter technology means stable, clean power in a smaller, lighter package. The precision of Honda's inverter technology ensures our inverter generators produce power that is as reliable as the power you get from your outlets at home.
Easy folding handles
The EU7000iS has convenient handles that can be raised for transport and lowered for more compact storage.
i-Monitor system tracks hours, RPM, battery volts, and wattage
i-Monitor™ provides information on hours of operation, wattage and engine speed, as well as diagnostics for convenient dealer servicing.
GFCI Outlets
The EU7000iS features two GFCI 20 amp, 120 V duplex outlets, meeting ETL and NEC standards.
120/240V Selector switch - More usable power, more flexibility
Choose between using both 120 and 240 Volts, or 120 Volts only. This allows for the total generator output to be available through any of the 120 volt outlets, limited only by the capacity of the individual outlet. This enables you to power units with larger wattage requirements.

Features may include:
Engine
Kubota
Remote Distance
500ft
Terrain-Capable Chassis
Transports Fast, Protects Turf, Operates Smoothly
Camera Feed
In Remote Mode
Dual Operation
Operator On & Remote
Right Joystick
The right joystick controls the machine speed and direction of travel, along with raising and lowering the front hitch.
The forward or backward movement of the right joystick controls the direction of the machine. The amount of forward or backward movement combined with the v-trim setting controls the ground speed of the machine.
The side-to-side movement of the joystick controls the front hitch. Move the joystick to the left to raise the front hitch. Move the joystick to the right to lower the front hitch.
Left Joystick
The left joystick controls the machine steering and the auxiliary hydraulic quick couplers.
Move the left joystick to the left or right to steer the machine left or right. The forward or backward movement of the left joystick controls the selected set of front hydraulic quick couplers.
Start Button
The start button is used to turn on and connect the remote control to the machine.
Horn Button
Press the horn button to sound the signal horn. The horn will sound until the button is released.
Multifunction Switch
The multifunction switch can be rotated to scroll through the display menu and settings and pushed to make a selection.
Engine Start Button
Press the engine start button to engage the starter. Release the button when the engine has started.
Throttle Up Button
Press the throttle up button to increase the engine speed.
Display View Selector
The display view selector switches the screen view between the standard machine status screen and the camera view (if equipped).
Auxiliary Coupler Selector Switch
The auxiliary coupler selector switch toggles the auxiliary coupler control between the red and yellow couplers and the black and white couplers.
Front 12V Switch On/Off
Move the switch forward to turn on power to the 4-pin front socket. Move the switch backward to turn off power to the 4-pin front socket.
Parking Brake Switch
Press the switch to engage the parking brake. The light next to the switch will light up when the parking brake is engaged. Press the switch again to disengage the parking brake.
PTO Switch
Press the switch to engage the electric clutch and send power to the front attachment. The light next to the switch will light up when the PTO clutch is engaged.
Press the switch again to disengage the clutch and stop the attachment.
PTO Switch
Press the switch to engage the float function of the front hitch. The light next to the switch will light up when the float function is engaged.
To disengage the float function, press the switch again or raise the attachment off the ground.
Winch Switch
Push the switch forward to spool out cable from the winch. Pull the switch backward to winch in the cable.

I purchased a John Deere 2025 and had issues with the 3pt hitch control arms. After multiple conversations and inquiries with salesman. I was still unable to use any 3pt attachments. I finally came into contact with John Ocheltree and he went above and beyond trying to resolve this issue which had now been several months of frustration for me. Once I spoke to John he took control of the situation and pushed forward finding the proper resolution. After researching the history and equipment purchased he scheduled one of his service technicians to verify proper installation and functionality. A service technician arrived in a timely manner by the name of AJ I believe. I found this technician to be knowledgeable and professional. After assessing the issues and verifying mechanical adjustments and installation he felt the wrong control arms were installed on the system (control arms for 1025 was installed and needed to be arms for 2025). He communicated he would need to order the proper arms and return upon arrival. He responded very quickly and returned for installation. The equipment now operates properly. I have been a field service engineer for 20yrs and I found this service department to be very customer oriented. I would recommend anyone in my community to purchase from this dealership due to their profound commitment to excellent customer service and dedication. These two individuals have earned future sales for this dealership.

Called the Buckhannon, WV location for a question concerning my John Deere 1026R not starting.
Spoke with Brad in the service department. This was mid morning on a Monday and Brad's department hit the ground running. As he spoke with me on the phone, he had so much going on with getting their day/week started. There was at least one tech, possibly two, asking questions of him. He was very kind and patient with those folks as he was with me. I had to be put on hold for around 60 seconds and he came right back to help me with my issue. He suggested fuses and a couple of other possibilities. He took time to tell me how to find the fuse panel and what to check out. He was very, very helpful to me and his associates. Very knowledgeable as well. He did ask that I might contact him back to let him know how he could further help me and or let me know if my problem had been resolved. Which after getting my 1026R started I did return his call and thanked him for all of his help. Very good service department to work with. Will always refer to them for my needs.

I purchased a John Deere 2025 and had issues with the 3pt hitch control arms. After multiple conversations and inquiries with salesman. I was still unable to use any 3pt attachments. I finally came into contact with John Ocheltree and he went above and beyond trying to resolve this issue which had now been several months of frustration for me. Once I spoke to John he took control of the situation and pushed forward finding the proper resolution. After researching the history and equipment purchased he scheduled one of his service technicians to verify proper installation and functionality. A service technician arrived in a timely manner by the name of AJ I believe. I found this technician to be knowledgeable and professional. After assessing the issues and verifying mechanical adjustments and installation he felt the wrong control arms were installed on the system (control arms for 1025 was installed and needed to be arms for 2025). He communicated he would need to order the proper arms and return upon arrival. He responded very quickly and returned for installation. The equipment now operates properly. I have been a field service engineer for 20yrs and I found this service department to be very customer oriented. I would recommend anyone in my community to purchase from this dealership due to their profound commitment to excellent customer service and dedication. These two individuals have earned future sales for this dealership.
Daniel
Shanholtz,
Wallace,
WV
Store Location:
Fairmont

Called the Buckhannon, WV location for a question concerning my John Deere 1026R not starting.
Spoke with Brad in the service department. This was mid morning on a Monday and Brad's department hit the ground running. As he spoke with me on the phone, he had so much going on with getting their day/week started. There was at least one tech, possibly two, asking questions of him. He was very kind and patient with those folks as he was with me. I had to be put on hold for around 60 seconds and he came right back to help me with my issue. He suggested fuses and a couple of other possibilities. He took time to tell me how to find the fuse panel and what to check out. He was very, very helpful to me and his associates. Very knowledgeable as well. He did ask that I might contact him back to let him know how he could further help me and or let me know if my problem had been resolved. Which after getting my 1026R started I did return his call and thanked him for all of his help. Very good service department to work with. Will always refer to them for my needs.

Called the Buckhannon, WV location for a question concerning my John Deere 1026R not starting.
Spoke with Brad in the service department. This was mid morning on a Monday and Brad's department hit the ground running. As he spoke with me on the phone, he had so much going on with getting their day/week started. There was at least one tech, possibly two, asking questions of him. He was very kind and patient with those folks as he was with me. I had to be put on hold for around 60 seconds and he came right back to help me with my issue. He suggested fuses and a couple of other possibilities. He took time to tell me how to find the fuse panel and what to check out. He was very, very helpful to me and his associates. Very knowledgeable as well. He did ask that I might contact him back to let him know how he could further help me and or let me know if my problem had been resolved. Which after getting my 1026R started I did return his call and thanked him for all of his help. Very good service department to work with. Will always refer to them for my needs.

I purchased a John Deere 2025 and had issues with the 3pt hitch control arms. After multiple conversations and inquiries with salesman. I was still unable to use any 3pt attachments. I finally came into contact with John Ocheltree and he went above and beyond trying to resolve this issue which had now been several months of frustration for me. Once I spoke to John he took control of the situation and pushed forward finding the proper resolution. After researching the history and equipment purchased he scheduled one of his service technicians to verify proper installation and functionality. A service technician arrived in a timely manner by the name of AJ I believe. I found this technician to be knowledgeable and professional. After assessing the issues and verifying mechanical adjustments and installation he felt the wrong control arms were installed on the system (control arms for 1025 was installed and needed to be arms for 2025). He communicated he would need to order the proper arms and return upon arrival. He responded very quickly and returned for installation. The equipment now operates properly. I have been a field service engineer for 20yrs and I found this service department to be very customer oriented. I would recommend anyone in my community to purchase from this dealership due to their profound commitment to excellent customer service and dedication. These two individuals have earned future sales for this dealership.

I purchased a John Deere 2025 and had issues with the 3pt hitch control arms. After multiple conversations and inquiries with salesman. I was still unable to use any 3pt attachments. I finally came into contact with John Ocheltree and he went above and beyond trying to resolve this issue which had now been several months of frustration for me. Once I spoke to John he took control of the situation and pushed forward finding the proper resolution. After researching the history and equipment purchased he scheduled one of his service technicians to verify proper installation and functionality. A service technician arrived in a timely manner by the name of AJ I believe. I found this technician to be knowledgeable and professional. After assessing the issues and verifying mechanical adjustments and installation he felt the wrong control arms were installed on the system (control arms for 1025 was installed and needed to be arms for 2025). He communicated he would need to order the proper arms and return upon arrival. He responded very quickly and returned for installation. The equipment now operates properly. I have been a field service engineer for 20yrs and I found this service department to be very customer oriented. I would recommend anyone in my community to purchase from this dealership due to their profound commitment to excellent customer service and dedication. Power, Versatility, and Comfort in One Compact Tractor
The
John Deere 1 Series Compact Utility Tractors
deliver ev
erything you need to get
more done on your property - power, precision, and ease of use. Designed to handle a wide range of tasks with minimal effort, these small but mighty tractors make mowing, loading, tilling, and grading easier than ever.
Equipped with a
Tier 4-compliant diesel engine
and a
premium operator station
featuring ergonomic seating, armrests, fender lights, and a new easy-lift hood with
dual gas-charged struts
, the 1 Series combines performance and comfort in a truly capable package.
Key Features
Powerful Tier 4-Compliant Diesel Engine
- Reliable performance with reduced emissions.
AutoConnect™ Mid-Mower Deck
- Attach or remove your deck in under 5 minutes without tools.
Premium Operator Station
- Comfort-focused design for long hours of productive work.
Hydrostatic Transmission (HST) with Twin Touch Pedals
- Infinite ground speeds and direction changes without clutching.
Standard Four-Wheel Drive and Power Steering
- Superior traction, control, and maneuverability for tight spaces and uneven terrain.
The
John Deere 1 Series
delivers the strength and stability to tackle a wide range of jobs - from mowing and grading to hauling and light excavation - all while maintaining excellent balance and comfort.
Fast & Easy Implement Swaps
Spend more time working and less time switching equipment. The
1 Family Tractors
are built to minimize setup time with easy-to-use systems that make implement changes quick and tool-free:
AutoConnect™ Deck System
- Attach or remove your mower deck in less than 60 seconds.
Load-N-Go™ Attachment
- Easily move your 60D AutoConnect™ Deck using your John Deere Loader.
Quik-Park™ Loader System
- Mount or remove the 120R Loader in about one minute-no tools required.
Quik-Tatch™ Front Hitch
- Switch front implements like snow blowers or blades without tools.
iMatch™ Quick-Hitch
- Hook up Category 1 implements in seconds.
Position Control Hitch
- Maintain consistent rear hitch height for leveling or grading work.
Quik-Knect™ PTO System
- Connect PTO-driven implements effortlessly with one connector.
With
dual selective control valves (SCVs)
standard-and an optional third SCV-the 1 Series can handle up to
three implements simultaneously
, maximizing productivity.
Unmatched Maneuverability and Performance
The
compact size
of the 1 Series makes it perfect for working in tight spaces that larger tractors can't reach. With a
57-inch wheelbase
and
47-inch overall width
, these tractors provide stability across a variety of terrains while minimizing ground compaction.
The
independent PTO system
allows operators to engage or disengage implements on the go - ideal for mowing across driveways or obstacles without stopping.

text:
Skip to main content
The Jack of All Trades Tractor Package
Designed for property owners and small contractors who need the ultimate all-in-one machine, this powerful compact tractor package handles everything from digging and lifting to hauling and loading.
Package Includes:
54D AutoConnect™ Mowing Deck
Effortlessly attach and detach your mower deck—no lifting, no tools, no hassle.

Prep soil for gardens, food plots, landscaping, and lawn renovation with ease.

Clear brush, tall grass, weeds, and overgrown areas quickly and efficiently.

Load mulch, dirt, gravel, firewood, and more with smooth, reliable performance.
With dependable engineering and legendary John Deere quality, the 1023E “Jack of All Trades” Package gives you the flexibility to handle every task—big or small—without switching machines.

Stop by any of our MTS locations for a test drive and custom quote:
Take a Test Ride
Value Your Trade
Get Financing
Get a Quote
2023 John Deere® 1025R
Powerful Final Tier 4-compliant diesel engine
New, easy-lift hood with dual gas-charged lift struts
Premium Operator Station with ergonomic seat, armrests and fender lights
Auto-Connect™ mid-mower deck can be installed or removed in less than 5 minutes
Features may include:
Spend more time working and less time switching equipment with easy implement swaps
The 1 Family Sub-compact Tractors bring joy to property maintenance with features like the industry-exclusive AutoConnect™ Drive-over Mower Deck and convenient Quik-Park™ Loader.
AutoConnect Deck System: Connect a mid-mount mower deck to the tractor in less than 60 seconds without leaving the seat except to lock the gauge wheels.
Load-N-Go attachment: Easily move your 60D Autoconnect Deck with your John Deere Loader after it has been disconnected from the tractor with the Load-N-Go ramps.
Quik-Park™ Loader System: 120R Quik-Park™ Loaders are designed for easy mounting and removal in about a minute, with no tools needed.
Quik-Tatch™ front hitch: Save time switching front implements like a snow blower, rotary broom, or front blade without tools.
iMatch™ quick-hitch: Easily hookup Category 1 implements in seconds using three fixed points to back in and pick up rear implements without leaving the seat
Position control hitch: Set the rear hitch height and then consistently lower the hitch to the exact height every time, which is especially useful in grading and leveling applications.
Quik-Knect™ system: Connect power take-off (PTO)-driven implements quickly and with low physical effort. The Quik-Knect system utilizes one connector for the tractor's PTO shaft and a designated connector for each implement which eliminates twisting and forcing splines to align.
1 Family Tractors can have up to three implements mounted simultaneously due to standard dual selective control valves (SCVs), allowing you to switch from using one implement to another without stopping to adjust. When a third SCV kit is added, the number of possible combinations is greatly increased.
Quickly and easily change speed and directions with Twin Touch foot controls and Hydrostatic transmission (HST)
The hydrostatic transmission's infinite ground speeds and direction of travel are both controlled with the Twin Touch foot pedals.
Ideal for loader or mower applications where frequent direction and speed changes are needed
No clutching for fast direction changes
Match the job at hand with infinite ground speeds
Excellent maneuverability and easy operation with standard four-wheel drive (4WD) and power steering
Both 4WD and power steering are standard equipment on the 1 Family Tractors. This combination allows for excellent maneuverability and ease of operation.
Narrow overall width allows you to work in tight areas where most compact tractors just cannot fit. The 144.8-cm (57-in.) wheel base and 119.4 cm (47 in.) overall width gives great stability for all types of terrain.
Power steering means fewer turns of the steering wheel than manual steering, which is especially valuable when mowing around obstacles or during front loader work.
High horsepower-to-weight ratio makes the 1 Family Tractors a good choice for a variety of tasks. The overall tractor weight reduces ground compaction and makes them excellent for mowing.
The fully-independent power take-off (PTO) allows engaging and disengaging of the PTO without stopping tractor movement. This is important when driving across obstacles such as driveways while mowing.
Visit
one of our four convenient locations
today! We currently serve Fairmont & Buckhannon, West Virginia, as well as Uniontown & Washington, Pennsylvania.
Don't see what you're looking for? Give us a call or stop by today to have a salesman build a custom package just for you. We want to put you in the RIGHT yellow seat - because we know you equipment is more than just equipment. It's your hobbies, passions, and livelihood, and you need reliability and versatility to get the job done.
